data.body:
G3 container coverage (parent 3fe1 + this grounding/_engine_support child): CLEAN — no findings.

4-bucket map vs parent criteria for this pairing (absences cross-checked against the WHOLE sibling roster):
- AC1 (logging substrate + stdout-purity test): structural — sibling 8fbd.
- AC2 (exemplar llm/plan_review + enable BLE001/T201 + shrinking allowlist): structural — sibling 16a1.
- AC3 (~100 unguarded broad-except sites remediated in batches): PARTIAL — this child remediates the grounding/ + _engine_support/ slice; remainder tiled by 8d01/ceaa/fd72/0569. No orphaned package.
- AC4 (narrowing surfaces hidden bug -> fix + regression test): PARTIAL/contributory — narrows/justifies grounding/harness.py:281 except BaseException (confirmed in source: line 281 carries the inert `# noqa: BLE0001` typo over `except BaseException`, finally-block also has a silent `except Exception: pass` at 286-287 within these packages — both fall within this child's floor scope).
- AC5 (allowlist emptied; lint+tests pass): PARTIAL — removes own packages from allowlist; final emptying/gate is 0ec1; child is parented to 3fe1 with file_impact set.
- SC1 (one lint-enforced way): contributory — convention by 16a1, finalized 0ec1.
- SC2 (silent failures observable; KI/SE never swallowed; stdout pure): PARTIAL — UNIQUELY owns the harness.py:281 landmine (typo'd noqa leaves except BaseException inert/unguarded, currently swallows KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit).
- SC3 (future audit clean; new offenders fail CI): structural — gate 16a1, final audit 0ec1.

No parent acceptance/success criterion is left uncovered, and no gap is attributable to this pairing. Child scope is fully subsumed by parent AC3/AC4/SC2. Empty findings list.
